title: $:/plugins/wikilabs/info-tagmap
name: Info TagMap
description: Adds a Tag-Map tab to the tiddler info section
author: Mario Pietsch
text:
{"tiddlers":{"$:/wikilabs/ui/TiddlerInfo/TagMap":{"title":"$:/wikilabs/ui/TiddlerInfo/TagMap","tags":"$:/tags/TiddlerInfo","caption":"Tag Map","text":"\whitespace trim
<$list filter="[all[current]tags[]sort[title]]" emptyMessage="This tiddler has no tags"> <$let hasPositional={{{ [all[shadows+tiddlers]!is[draft]taghas:field[list-before]] [all[shadows+tiddlers]!is[draft]taghas:field[list-after]] +[first[]] }}} lockState={{{ [[$:/state/wikilabs/info-tagmap/unlocked/]addsuffix] }}} >
<$transclude tiddler="$:/core/ui/ListItemTemplate"/> <%if [!is[blank]] %> <%if [get[text]match[yes]] %> <$button set=<> setTo="" tooltip="Lock to disable drag-and-drop sorting (preserves list-before / list-after fields)" class="tc-btn-invisible tc-small-gap-left"> {{$:/core/images/unlocked-padlock}} <%else%> <$button set=<> setTo="yes" tooltip="Unlock to enable drag-and-drop sorting (will clear list-before / list-after on the first drop)" class="tc-btn-invisible tc-small-gap-left"> {{$:/core/images/locked-padlock}} <%endif%> <%endif%>
<%if [!is[blank]] %> <%if [get[text]match[yes]] %> <$macrocall $name="list-tagged-draggable" tag=<> subFilter="!is[draft]" itemTemplate="$:/wikilabs/ui/TiddlerInfo/TagMap/ItemTemplate"/> <%else%> <$list filter="[all[shadows+tiddlers]!is[draft]sort[title]tag]" template="$:/wikilabs/ui/TiddlerInfo/TagMap/ItemTemplate"/> <%endif%> <%else%> <$macrocall $name="list-tagged-draggable" tag=<> subFilter="!is[draft]" itemTemplate="$:/wikilabs/ui/TiddlerInfo/TagMap/ItemTemplate"/> <%endif%>
"},"$:/wikilabs/ui/TiddlerInfo/TagMap/ItemTemplate":{"title":"$:/wikilabs/ui/TiddlerInfo/TagMap/ItemTemplate","text":"\whitespace trim
<$link to=<>> <$view field="title"/> <%if [has:field[list-before]] %> ↑ <%endif%> <%if [has:field[list-after]] %> ↓ <%endif%>
"},"$:/wikilabs/ui/TiddlerInfo/TagMap/Styles":{"title":"$:/wikilabs/ui/TiddlerInfo/TagMap/Styles","tags":"$:/tags/Stylesheet","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":".flexbox { display: -webkit-flex; display: -ms-flexbox; display: flex; overflow: hidden; flex-direction: row; flex-flow: row wrap; } .flexbox .col { flex: 1 1 33%; margin-bottom: 1em; } <$let wltcBg=<> wltcColA=<> wltcColB=<>> <$wikify name="wltcFg" text="""<$macrocall $name="contrastcolour" target=<> fallbackTarget=<> colourA=<> colourB=<>/>"""> .wltc-list-pos { font-size: 0.85em; margin-left: 0.5em; padding: 0 0.4em; border-radius: 4px; background: <>; color: <>; } "},"$:/plugins/wikilabs/info-tagmap/history":{"title":"$:/plugins/wikilabs/info-tagmap/history","text":"V 0.4.0 - 2026-05-15 * Per-column padlock protects `list-before` / `list-after` fields; click to unlock drag-and-drop sorting. * Badge tooltip now reads `list-before: ` instead of just the value. V 0.3.0 - 2026-05-15 * Tagged items in the Tag Map now show a ↑ / ↓ badge when they carry a `list-before` or `list-after` field. Hover the badge to see the field value. * Inner list switched to alphabetical sort with `list-before` / `list-after` positional fields applied via `tag[]`. V 0.2.2 - 2024-05-23 * Add stability badges ** The development status of a plugin: deprecated, experimental, stable, or legacy V 0.2.1 - 2022-08-04 * Fix whitespace handling for TW v5.2.3 V 0.2.0 - 2022-03-27 * ''Important'': Changed license to Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike -- [[CC-BY-NC-SA|$:/plugins/wikilabs/info-tagmap/license]] V 0.1.3 - 2020-12-25 * update license V 0.1.2 - 2020.01.19 * Update license link/text V 0.1.1 - 2016 * initial release "},"$:/plugins/wikilabs/info-tagmap/license":{"title":"$:/plugins/wikilabs/info-tagmap/license","license-text":"https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/legalcode","text":"[[Info-Tag-Map|https://wikilabs.github.io/#info-tagmap]] (c) Mario Pietsch - 2016<> [[Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike|https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/]] "},"$:/plugins/wikilabs/info-tagmap/readme":{"title":"$:/plugins/wikilabs/info-tagmap/readme","text":"This plugin adds a new tab to the tiddler info section. It's a multi column list of all tiddler tags plus all tagged tiddlers. This plugin doesn't change any core templates. The code below can be copied into the tag tiddlers. ``` All tiddlers tagged: {{!!title}} <> ```"}}}
